formulas.name: Law of Avenues of Pollination
formulas.formula: Pollination occurs through 3 main avenues: wind, water, and agents (insects, birds, bats, etc.)
formulas.notes: Understanding the different ways pollination occurs

formulas.name: Types of Fertilization
formulas.formula: Fertilization occurs in two ways: double fertilization (in angiosperms) and monofertilization (in gymnosperms)
formulas.notes: Understanding the fertilization process in different plant groups

formulas.name: Process of Double Fertilization
formulas.formula: Double fertilization involves two pollen grains: one fertilizes the egg cell (triple fusion), and the other fertilizes the two polar cells (diploid primary endosperm nucleus)
formulas.variables: Pollen grains, egg cell, triple fusion, diploid primary endosperm nucleus
formulas.notes: Understanding the steps involved in double fertilization

formulas.name: Structure of Male Gametophyte (Pollen Grain)
formulas.formula: Pollen grain consists of a pollen tube, generative cell, and vegetative cell
formulas.variables: Pollen grain, pollen tube, generative cell, vegetative cell
formulas.notes: Understanding the components of a pollen grain

formulas.name: Process of Pollination
formulas.formula: Pollination occurs when pollen is transferred from the anther to the stigma of a flower
